name: Date/Nut Muffins
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the flour and leavenings in a large bowl.
2. Stir in the bran or germ, dates, and nuts.
3. In another bowl, mix the remaining ingredients until smooth; add to the flour mixture.
4. Stir just to combine.
5. Drop the batter into muffin cups (makes 12 small ones).
6. Sprinkle rolled oats on top for a decorative touch.
7. Bake at 375 degrees Fahrenheit for 15-20 minutes.
Non-vegan slightly higher-fat alternative: Substitute buttermilk and an egg for the apple juice.
